per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identifies some components of the problem but misses the connection between customer churn and model evaluation.
The objectives are mentioned but lack specificity and measurable criteria.
The student does not adequately align the task with best practices in model evaluation, particularly regarding overfitting and generalization.

justification: The student demonstrates insufficient understanding in framing, missing critical contextual relevance and lacking specificity in task specification.
